items.title: Insight-graduation write seam (published win / content win / search win / schema win → insight)
items.description: Single shared 'graduate to Insights Engine' write path: new POST route + a registered content/win InsightType via the 4-part registration rule, reusing existing upsertInsight with broadcast + addActivity + ephemeral-source snapshot-ref. Consuming surfaces pass their own source (published post, search win, schema deploy). Contract is TBD and MUST be defined once, not re-invented per surface.
items.notes: Home: server/routes/insights.ts (POST) + shared/types/analytics.ts (new InsightType) + server/analytics-insights-store.ts upsertInsight. Verify: schema's rich-result DETECTION data source is a separate net-new dependency (SB-021) that gates the schema variant only. Dedup of content-pipeline-7 / performance-3 / schema-3 / search-traffic-3 / ai-visibility (N6 graduation) — all named 'graduation' but converge on one insight-write contract.

items.title: Promote client request → strategy signal / backing move (mint rec/insight from inbox request)
items.description: Generic write turning an inbox/client request into an Insights-Engine insight or a minted recommendation, with request status transition, activity log + broadcast, typed provenance. Reuse mintManualRecommendation as the rec base (Recommendation.source is a free-form string — no union to widen; pass e.g. 'client_request:<id>'); honest attribution needs the ephemeral-source snapshot-ref pattern to record which request minted the rec.
items.notes: Home: server/routes/requests.ts (or insights.ts) + server/domains/recommendations/route-mutations.ts (mintManualRecommendation reuse) + insight store. Dedup of cockpit-4 (promote-to-signal), global-ops-4 (request→signal), engine-3 (client-request→backing-move). VERIFY correction: no source union exists — pass distinct source string, no migration for the union.

items.title: Read-safe money-frame projection (value-at-stake / recovered-so-far / basis pill)
items.description: Precomputed (cron/snapshot, NOT compute-on-GET) admin money read for the Engine/cockpit header. computeROI WRITES a snapshot (server/roi.ts:411), so it must NOT run on a hot GET — use the return-hook cron precompute pattern. revenueAtStake ALREADY exists (ROIData.revenueAtStake); only 'recovered-so-far' + 'basis pill' are net-new derived fields. Serialize OutcomeProvenance (estimate/measured/actual, read-time value, NOT the persisted admin-only OutcomeCoverageProvenance) onto money rows.
items.notes: Home: server/routes/the-issue-admin.ts (or new strategy-engine read) + return-hook-cron precompute. VERIFY: value-at-stake half is REUSE of ROIData.revenueAtStake, not a build. Provenance serialization (cockpit-3) is pure read-time (effort S) — use OutcomeProvenance at outcome-tracking.ts:139 / roi.ts:71, never OutcomeCoverageProvenance at :293. Dedup of engine-1 + cockpit-1 + cockpit-3.

items.title: Unified server-side work-queue / stream classification (opt/send/money + unclassified)

Replaces the client-side attention assembly in WorkspaceHome.tsx (~10 inline pushes). Shared by cockpit and the global-ops all-clients Today.
items.notes: Home: server/routes/workspace-home.ts or a server/domains/ work-queue module. Dedup of cockpit-2 (both surfaces reuse the same streams). Blocker because both consuming surfaces depend on identical counts.

items.title: Per-page keyword / rank / traffic / optimization-score projection onto page-row payloads
items.description: Join per-page primaryKeyword, current rank position, monthly organic traffic, and persisted optimizationScore onto the all-pages / editor / load-page row payloads, avoiding N-per-row API fan-out. Source is the dedicated page_keywords table (current_position/previous_position/optimization_score columns via listPageKeywordsPaged / listPageKeywordsLite — side-effect-free reads), NOT keywordStrategy JSON. maybeRecordScoreSnapshot fires only on writes, so list reads are hot-path safe.
items.notes: Home: server/routes/webflow.ts all-pages assembly + rewrite-chat load-page handler + server/page-keywords.ts (listPageKeywordsPaged/Lite). VERIFY: score source is page_keywords column, not keywordStrategy re-parse (effort S for score alone; M with rank+traffic join). Dedup of seo-editor-3 + seo-editor-6 + page-rewriter-3 + competitors-1(top-3 half separate). GA4 monthly organic traffic remains workspace-level (google.ts:356) — per-page needs pagePath-filtered read.
